calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2021 Continued To Aug-11-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Apr-13-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Fred Williamson and Fred Williamson Consulting LLC, a California limited liability company.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Denise Wilson Eastman, CSR #8557. Email: dwilsoneastman@sftc.org.

Brian Gearginger, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Brian Striffer, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Gearinger and Streiffer appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Fred Williamson or Fred Williamson Consulting LLC, a California limited liability company.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Fraud by: (1) Intentional Misrepresentation; (2) Concealment; (3) False Promise; and (4) Negligent Misrepresentation was filed on September 8, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on October 8, 2020 and was effectuated on October 19, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on December 1, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 19, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Brian Streiffer, and against the defaulted defendants Fred Williamson and Fred Williamson Consulting LLC, a California limited liability company, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,028.30.
Costs - $1,414.40.
Total - $60,442.70.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Continued To Apr-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
